'''pothawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:meanable|meanable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meanable|meanable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pothawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pothawithi|pothawithi]] || [[word:pothawiji|pothawiji]] || [[word:pothawishi|pothawishi]] || [[word:pothawiki|pothawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pothawuthuthu|pothawuthuthu]] || [[word:pothawujuju|pothawujuju]] || [[word:pothawushushu|pothawushushu]] || [[word:pothawukuku|pothawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pothawuthu|pothawuthu]] || [[word:pothawuju|pothawuju]] || [[word:pothawushu|pothawushu]] || [[word:pothawuku|pothawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pothawufthuf|pothawufthuf]] || [[word:pothawufjuf|pothawufjuf]] || [[word:pothawufshuf|pothawufshuf]] || [[word:pothawufkuf|pothawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pothawethe|pothawethe]] || [[word:pothaweje|pothaweje]] || [[word:pothaweshe|pothaweshe]] || [[word:pothaweke|pothaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pothawothotho|pothawothotho]] || [[word:pothawojojo|pothawojojo]] || [[word:pothawoshosho|pothawoshosho]] || [[word:pothawokoko|pothawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pothawotho|pothawotho]] || [[word:pothawojo|pothawojo]] || [[word:pothawosho|pothawosho]] || [[word:pothawoko|pothawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pothawofthof|pothawofthof]] || [[word:pothawofjof|pothawofjof]] || [[word:pothawofshof|pothawofshof]] || [[word:pothawofkof|pothawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:pothawïfthïf|pothawïfthïf]] || [[word:pothawïfjïf|pothawïfjïf]] || [[word:pothawïfshïf|pothawïfshïf]] || [[word:pothawïfkïf|pothawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:pothawïfthïfthïf|pothawïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:pothawïfjïfjïf|pothawïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:pothawïfshïfshïf|pothawïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:pothawïfkïfkïf|pothawïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:pothawïfthïf|pothawïfthïf]] || [[word:pothawïfjïf|pothawïfjïf]] || [[word:pothawïfshïf|pothawïfshïf]] || [[word:pothawïfkïf|pothawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:pothawïfthïf|pothawïfthïf]] || [[word:pothawïfjïf|pothawïfjïf]] || [[word:pothawïfshïf|pothawïfshïf]] || [[word:pothawïfkïf|pothawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pothawæthæ|pothawæthæ]] || [[word:pothawæjæ|pothawæjæ]] || [[word:pothawæshæ|pothawæshæ]] || [[word:pothawækæ|pothawækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pothawathatha|pothawathatha]] || [[word:pothawajaja|pothawajaja]] || [[word:pothawashasha|pothawashasha]] || [[word:pothawakaka|pothawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pothawatha|pothawatha]] || [[word:pothawaja|pothawaja]] || [[word:pothawasha|pothawasha]] || [[word:pothawaka|pothawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pothawafthaf|pothawafthaf]] || [[word:pothawafjaf|pothawafjaf]] || [[word:pothawafshaf|pothawafshaf]] || [[word:pothawafkaf|pothawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:pothawasha|pothawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:pothawshësha|pothawshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pothawrosha|pothawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pothawmusha|pothawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:pothawyasha|pothawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopothawnkshësha|gopothawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopothawnkrosha|gopothawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopothawnkmusha|gopothawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopothawnkyasha|gopothawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:pothathawasha|pothathawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pothathawshësha|pothathawshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pothathawrosha|pothathawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pothathawmusha|pothathawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pothathawyasha|pothathawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopothathawnkshësha|gopothathawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopothathawnkrosha|gopothathawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopothathawnkmusha|gopothathawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopothathawnkyasha|gopothathawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pethæwasha|pethæwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pethæwshësha|pethæwshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pethæwrosha|pethæwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pethæwmusha|pethæwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pethæwyasha|pethæwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopethæwnkshësha|gopethæwnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopethæwnkrosha|gopethæwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopethæwnkmusha|gopethæwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopethæwnkyasha|gopethæwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:pothfawasha|pothfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pothfawshësha|pothfawshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pothfawrosha|pothfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pothfawmusha|pothfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pothfawyasha|pothfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopothfawnkshësha|gopothfawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopothfawnkrosha|gopothfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopothfawnkmusha|gopothfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopothfawnkyasha|gopothfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
